subcodes.first_line: O ye who help the Cause! Aid ye your Lord amidst the wicked, and be not of the heedless. Every soul hath been created for the propagation [of His Cause] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نصار ان انصر ربک بین الاشرار و لاتکن من الغافلین قد خلق کل نفس لتبلیغ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
